{% for block in section.blocks %} {% case block.type %} {% when 'faq-item' %}
{{ block.settings.question }}

{% stylesheet %} .faq-accordion { width: 100%; } .section-heading { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .faq-accordion__content { width: 100%; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; } .faq-accordion__item { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(var(--color-border), 0.1); } .faq-accordion__item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .faq-accordion__details { width: 100%; } .faq-accordion__summary { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 1.5rem 0; cursor: pointer; list-style: none; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.4; } .faq-accordion__summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .faq-accordion__question { flex: 1; margin-right: 1rem; } .faq-accordion__icon { flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 0.3s ease; color: rgba(var(--color-foreground), 0.6); } .faq-accordion__details[open] .faq-accordion__icon { transform: rotate(45deg); } .faq-accordion__answer { padding-bottom: 1.5rem; color: rgba(var(--color-foreground), 0.8); line-height: 1.6; } .faq-accordion__answer p { margin: 0 0 1rem 0; } .faq-accordion__answer p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .faq-accordion__summary:hover { color: rgba(var(--color-foreground), 0.8); } @media screen and (max-width: 749px) { .faq-accordion__summary { padding: 1rem 0; font-size: 1rem; } .faq-accordion__answer { padding-bottom: 1rem; } } {% endstylesheet %} {% schema %} { "name": "FAQ Accordion", "class": "section-wrapper", "blocks": [ { "type": "faq-item", "name": "FAQ Item", "settings": [ { "type": "text", "id": "question", "label": "Question", "default": "What is your return policy?" }, { "type": "textarea", "id": "answer", "label": "Answer", "default": "We offer a 30-day return policy on all items. Items must be in original condition with tags attached." } ] } ], "settings": [ { "type": "text", "id": "heading", "label": "Section Heading", "default": "Frequently Asked Questions" }, { "type": "color_scheme", "id": "color_scheme", "label": "Color Scheme", "default": "scheme-1" }, { "type": "header", "content": "Padding" }, { "type": "range", "id": "padding-block-start", "label": "Top", "min": 0, "max": 100, "step": 1, "unit": "px", "default": 50 }, { "type": "range", "id": "padding-block-end", "label": "Bottom", "min": 0, "max": 100, "step": 1, "unit": "px", "default": 50 } ], "presets": [ { "name": "FAQ Accordion", "blocks": [ { "type": "faq-item", "settings": { "question": "What is your shipping policy?", "answer": "We offer free shipping on orders over $50. Standard shipping typically takes 3-5 business days, and expedited shipping options are available at checkout." } }, { "type": "faq-item", "settings": { "question": "What is your return policy?", "answer": "We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be in original condition with tags attached. Please contact our customer service team to initiate a return." } }, { "type": "faq-item", "settings": { "question": "How do I find my size?", "answer": "You can find our size guide on each product page. We recommend measuring yourself and comparing to our size chart for the best fit. If you're between sizes, we generally recommend sizing up." } } ] } ] } {% endschema %}
